title: montia aquatica
intro: Montia aquatica, also known as watercress, is a semi-aquatic plant that belongs to the family Montiaceae. It has been used for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Montia aquatica include reducing the risk of certain cancers, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive function. Montia aquatica can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or added to salads, and it has also been traditionally used as a topical application for skin conditions.
